Printing Guide

Sublimation Clothing Manufacturer: The Complete Guide to All-Over Print Apparel

✎ FABRIOZA Team 📅 July 1, 2026 ☕ 11 min read
Home / Blog / Sublimation Clothing Manufacturer: The Complete Guide to All-Over Print Apparel

Sublimation printing is the gold standard for vibrant, permanent, all-over designs on polyester garments. At FABRIOZA, we produce sublimated sportswear, jerseys, and activewear with MOQ from 50 pieces and color vibrancy that lasts the lifetime of the garment.

What Is Sublimation Printing?

Sublimation uses heat to convert dye into gas, which bonds directly with polyester fibers. The result: colors become part of the fabric, not sitting on top. This means zero cracking, zero peeling, and zero fading — even after hundreds of washes.

Sublimation vs Screen Print vs DTF vs Embroidery

MethodBest ForDurabilityColors
SublimationAll-over designs, jerseysPermanentUnlimited
Screen PrintSimple logos, cottonGood1-6
DTFDetailed graphics, small runsGoodUnlimited
EmbroideryBadges, premium logosExcellentLimited

Products We Manufacture With Sublimation

  • Soccer/Football Jerseys: Full-kit designs with sponsor logos, numbers, names
  • Cycling Kits: Bold geometric designs on jerseys and bib shorts
  • Basketball Uniforms: Reversible jerseys with all-over patterns
  • MMA/BJJ Rash Guards: Full-coverage artwork on compression fit
  • Running Singlets: Lightweight with edge-to-edge designs
  • Esports Jerseys: Team branding with sponsor integration

Design File Requirements

We accept AI, EPS, PDF, and high-resolution PNG files. For best results, designs should be created at 150-300 DPI at actual print size. Our design team can help optimize your artwork for sublimation printing.

Quality Control

Every sublimated garment passes color accuracy checks, registration verification, and wash-fastness testing. We use ICC color profiling to ensure accurate Pantone matching on polyester.

MOQ and Pricing

50 pieces per design. Individual names and numbers included at no extra cost. Prices range from $12-22 per unit depending on garment type and complexity.

Turnaround Times

Samples: typically 1-3 weeks. Bulk production: 2-3 weeks after sample approval. Air shipping: 5-7 days worldwide.

Order Your Custom Sublimation Sportswear From FABRIOZA

50 pieces minimum. Vibrant permanent colors. Free digital mockup in 24 hours.

Frequently Asked Questions

What fabric is required for sublimation?

100% polyester or minimum 85% polyester blend. Cotton cannot be sublimated.

Can sublimation print white?

No, sublimation cannot print white. White areas show the base fabric color. For white prints, we use white base fabric.

How durable is sublimation printing?

Extremely durable — the dye becomes part of the fiber. It will not crack, peel, or fade for the lifetime of the garment.

Can you match Pantone colors?

Yes, we use ICC color profiling to achieve accurate Pantone matching on polyester.

What is the minimum order for sublimation?

50 pieces per design. Individual names/numbers included at no extra cost.
